docx-work-report.label: 工作总结
docx-work-report.description: 季度或年度工作总结报告
docx-work-report.prompt:
请帮我生成一份季度工作总结Word文档，包含以下内容：

1. 本季度核心工作成果
2. 重点项目进展与里程碑
3. 关键数据指标完成情况
4. 遇到的问题与解决方案
5. 下季度工作计划

格式要求：专业商务风格，结构清晰，适合向管理层汇报。

docx-meeting-minutes.label: 会议纪要
docx-meeting-minutes.description: 规范化的会议记录文档
docx-meeting-minutes.prompt:
请帮我生成一份会议纪要Word文档，包含：

1. 会议基本信息（时间、地点、参会人员）
2. 会议议题与讨论要点
3. 重要决策与结论
4. 行动计划（责任人、截止日期）
5. 下次会议安排

格式要求：正式规范，条理清晰，便于存档和跟进。

docx-project-proposal.label: 项目方案
docx-project-proposal.description: 项目立项或实施方案文档
docx-project-proposal.prompt:
请帮我生成一份项目方案Word文档，包含：

1. 项目背景与目标
2. 项目范围与内容
3. 实施计划与时间节点
4. 资源需求与预算估算
5. 风险分析与应对措施
6. 预期成果与效益

格式要求：逻辑严密，内容翔实，适合提交审批。

docx-summary.label: 汇报材料
docx-summary.description: 工作汇报或情况说明文档
docx-summary.prompt:
请帮我生成一份工作汇报Word文档，包含：

1. 工作概述
2. 主要工作内容与进展
3. 取得的成效
4. 存在的问题与建议
5. 下一步工作安排

格式要求：简洁明了，重点突出，适合汇报使用。

excel-summary.label: Excel 汇总统计
excel-summary.description: 对 Excel 数据做分类汇总与统计
excel-summary.prompt:
请读取我的 Excel 文件,帮我完成以下工作:

1. 按类别对数据进行分类汇总(求和、计数、平均值)
2. 生成各类别的占比分析
3. 标注异常值和关键数据
4. 输出一份整理好的汇总统计 Excel 文件,包含图表

image-to-excel.label: 图片/截图转表格
image-to-excel.description: 识别图片中的表格数据并生成 Excel
image-to-excel.prompt:
请识别我上传的图片中的表格内容,帮我:

1. 提取图片中所有表格数据
2. 整理为规范的行列格式
3. 修正识别中可能出现的错误
4. 生成一份格式清晰的 Excel 文件

word-report.label: 数据生成报告
word-report.description: 基于数据文件生成 Word 分析报告
word-report.prompt:
请根据我提供的数据文件,帮我生成一份 Word 分析报告,要求:

1. 包含数据概况说明
2. 核心指标统计与趋势分析
3. 重点发现与结论总结
4. 排版专业、条理清晰,可直接用于汇报

multi-excel-merge.label: 多表合并整理
multi-excel-merge.description: 合并多个 Excel 文件并统一格式
multi-excel-merge.prompt:
我有多个 Excel 文件需要合并整理,请帮我:

1. 将多个文件的数据合并到一张表中
2. 统一列名和数据格式
3. 去除重复数据
4. 生成一份合并后的 Excel 文件,并添加数据来源标记

moments-long.label: 长图阅读卡
moments-long.description: 生成适合朋友圈的长图文字卡片
moments-long.prompt:
请把以下内容做成一张朋友圈长图卡片（-l 模式），署名「我」，输出到 ~/Downloads/：

【在此粘贴你的内容】

moments-infograph.label: 信息图
moments-infograph.description: 数据或要点驱动的视觉信息图
moments-infograph.prompt:
请把以下内容做成一张朋友圈信息图（-i 模式），署名「我」，输出到 ~/Downloads/：

【在此粘贴你的内容】

moments-multi.label: 九宫格多图
moments-multi.description: 自动切分为多张适合朋友圈九宫格的卡片
moments-multi.prompt:
请把以下内容切分成多张朋友圈卡片（-m 模式，每张 1080×1440），署名「我」，输出到 ~/Downloads/：

【在此粘贴你的内容】

moments-sketchnote.label: 手绘视觉笔记
moments-sketchnote.description: 手绘风格 sketchnote 卡片
moments-sketchnote.prompt:
请把以下内容做成一张手绘风格的朋友圈视觉笔记（-v 模式），署名「我」，输出到 ~/Downloads/：

【在此粘贴你的内容】

ppt-work-report.label: 工作汇报
ppt-work-report.description: 季度或年度工作汇报演示文稿
ppt-work-report.prompt:
请帮我制作一份工作汇报 PPT，要求：

1. 封面页（标题 + 汇报人 + 日期）
2. 目录页
3. 本期核心成果（3-5 条，配数据）
4. 重点项目进展
5. 问题与风险
6. 下期计划
7. 结尾页

风格：简洁商务，蓝色系配色，每页不超过 5 行文字。

ppt-project-intro.label: 项目介绍
ppt-project-intro.description: 项目或产品介绍演示文稿
ppt-project-intro.prompt:
请帮我制作一份项目介绍 PPT，包含：

1. 封面（项目名称 + 副标题）
2. 项目背景与痛点
3. 解决方案与核心功能
4. 技术架构或实现路径
5. 项目进度与里程碑
6. 团队与资源
7. 预期成果

风格：专业现代，图文并茂，适合向领导或客户汇报。

ppt-training.label: 培训课件
ppt-training.description: 员工培训或知识分享课件
ppt-training.prompt:
请帮我制作一份培训课件 PPT，包含：

1. 封面（课程名称 + 讲师 + 日期）
2. 课程目标（学完能做什么）
3. 核心知识点（分 3-4 个模块）
4. 案例分析或实操演示
5. 常见问题与解答
6. 课程小结与行动建议

风格：清晰易读，重点突出，适合投影展示。

ppt-product-launch.label: 产品发布
ppt-product-launch.description: 新产品或新功能发布演示文稿
ppt-product-launch.prompt:
请帮我制作一份产品发布 PPT，包含：

1. 封面（产品名称 + 发布日期）
2. 市场背景与用户痛点
3. 产品亮点（3 个核心卖点）
4. 功能演示或截图展示
5. 与竞品对比优势
6. 定价与上线计划
7. 号召行动页

风格：视觉冲击力强，简洁大气，适合对外发布。

edu-english-words.label: 英语单词学习
edu-english-words.prompt:
我正在准备英语四级考试,请帮我整理一份高频核心词汇学习清单,要求:

1. 挑选 20 个高频必考单词
2. 每个单词给出音标、中文释义和一个简短例句
3. 按主题分组(如校园生活、工作职场、科技等)
4. 在最后给出一组小测验题,帮助我自测记忆效果

edu-math-explain.label: 数学题讲解
edu-math-explain.description: 数学难题的详细解题过程
edu-math-explain.prompt:
请用简单易懂的方式讲解以下数学知识:

题目:一元二次方程 2x² + 3x - 5 = 0 的求解

要求:
1. 先回顾一元二次方程的一般形式和求根公式
2. 一步步展示完整的代入和计算过程
3. 用判别式分析根的情况
4. 最后验算答案是否正确
5. 再出一道类似的练习题让我巩固

edu-essay-writing.label: 作文写作辅导
edu-essay-writing.prompt:
请以「我最难忘的一次旅行」为题,帮我进行作文写作辅导:

1. 先给出一个清晰的写作提纲(开头、正文、结尾的结构建议)
2. 分享 3 个让文章更生动的写作技巧(如细节描写、感官描写、借景抒情)
3. 写一段示范开头,展示如何吸引读者
4. 列出 5 个可以用在这篇作文中的好词好句
5. 提醒常见的写作问题和避坑要点

edu-knowledge-explain.label: 知识点科普
edu-knowledge-explain.description: 用通俗语言解释复杂知识
edu-knowledge-explain.prompt:
请用通俗易懂的语言给我科普「光合作用」这个知识点:

1. 用一句话概括光合作用是什么
2. 用生活中的类比来解释它的原理
3. 画出光合作用的简要过程(文字版流程图)
4. 说明光合作用对地球和人类的重要意义
5. 提出 3 个思考题,帮助我加深理解

docx-work-report.label: Work Summary
docx-work-report.description: Quarterly or annual work summary report
docx-work-report.prompt:
Please help me generate a quarterly work summary Word document with the following content:

1. Core work achievements this quarter
2. Key project progress and milestones
3. Key metrics completion status
4. Issues encountered and solutions
5. Next quarter work plan

Style: Professional business format, clear structure, suitable for management reporting.

docx-meeting-minutes.label: Meeting Minutes
docx-meeting-minutes.prompt:
Please help me generate a meeting minutes Word document including:

1. Meeting basic info (time, venue, attendees)
2. Meeting topics and discussion points
3. Key decisions and conclusions
4. Action items (owner, deadline)
5. Next meeting arrangements

Style: Formal and structured, easy to archive and follow up.

docx-project-proposal.label: Project Proposal
docx-project-proposal.description: Project initiation or implementation plan document
docx-project-proposal.prompt:
Please help me generate a project proposal Word document including:

1. Project background and objectives
2. Project scope and content
3. Implementation plan and milestones
4. Resource requirements and budget estimate
5. Risk analysis and mitigation measures
6. Expected outcomes and benefits

Style: Logical, detailed, suitable for approval submission.

docx-summary.label: Report Document
docx-summary.description: Work report or situation summary document
docx-summary.prompt:
Please help me generate a work report Word document including:

1. Work overview
2. Main work content and progress
3. Achievements
4. Issues and suggestions
5. Next steps

Style: Concise, key points highlighted, suitable for reporting.

excel-summary.label: Excel Summary
excel-summary.prompt:
Please read my Excel file and help me complete the following tasks:

1. Categorize data by category (sum, count, average)
2. Generate proportion analysis for each category
3. Mark outliers and key data points
4. Output a well-organized summary statistics Excel file with charts

image-to-excel.label: Image to Table
image-to-excel.description: Recognize table data in images and generate Excel
image-to-excel.prompt:
Please recognize the table content in the image I uploaded and help me:

1. Extract all table data from the image
2. Organize into standard row and column format
3. Correct possible recognition errors
4. Generate a clearly formatted Excel file

word-report.label: Data Report
word-report.description: Generate Word analysis report based on data files
word-report.prompt:
Please generate a Word analysis report based on the data file I provided, with the following requirements:

1. Include data overview description
2. Core metrics statistics and trend analysis
3. Key findings and conclusion summary
4. Professional layout, clear structure, ready for reporting

multi-excel-merge.label: Merge Multiple Tables
multi-excel-merge.description: Merge multiple Excel files and standardize format
multi-excel-merge.prompt:
I have multiple Excel files that need to be merged and organized. Please help me:

1. Merge data from multiple files into one table
2. Standardize column names and data formats
3. Remove duplicate data
4. Generate a merged Excel file with data source markers

moments-long.label: Long Card
moments-long.description: Generate a long-form reading card for Moments
moments-long.prompt:
Please turn the following content into a WeChat Moments long card (-l mode), signed "Me", output to ~/Downloads/:

[Paste your content here]

moments-infograph.label: Infographic
moments-infograph.description: Data or key-point driven visual infographic
moments-infograph.prompt:
Please turn the following content into a WeChat Moments infographic (-i mode), signed "Me", output to ~/Downloads/:

[Paste your content here]

moments-multi.label: Multi-card Grid
moments-multi.description: Auto-split into multiple cards for Moments 9-grid
moments-multi.prompt:
Please split the following content into multiple Moments cards (-m mode, 1080×1440 each), signed "Me", output to ~/Downloads/:

[Paste your content here]

moments-sketchnote.label: Sketchnote
moments-sketchnote.prompt:
Please turn the following content into a hand-drawn style Moments sketchnote (-v mode), signed "Me", output to ~/Downloads/:

[Paste your content here]

ppt-work-report.label: Work Report
ppt-work-report.description: Quarterly or annual work report presentation
ppt-work-report.prompt:
Please create a work report PPT with:

1. Cover page (title + presenter + date)
2. Table of contents
3. Key achievements this period (3-5 items with data)
4. Key project progress
5. Issues and risks
6. Next period plan
7. Closing page

Style: Clean business look, blue color scheme, max 5 lines per slide.

ppt-project-intro.label: Project Introduction
ppt-project-intro.prompt:
Please create a project introduction PPT including:

1. Cover (project name + subtitle)
2. Background and pain points
3. Solution and core features
4. Technical architecture or implementation path
5. Project timeline and milestones
6. Team and resources
7. Expected outcomes

Style: Professional and modern, visual, suitable for presenting to leadership or clients.

ppt-training.label: Training Slides
ppt-training.description: Employee training or knowledge sharing slides
ppt-training.prompt:
Please create a training slides PPT including:

1. Cover (course name + instructor + date)
2. Learning objectives
3. Core knowledge (3-4 modules)
4. Case studies or hands-on demos
5. FAQ
6. Summary and action recommendations

Style: Clear and readable, key points highlighted, suitable for projection.

ppt-product-launch.label: Product Launch
ppt-product-launch.description: New product or feature launch presentation
ppt-product-launch.prompt:
Please create a product launch PPT including:

1. Cover (product name + launch date)
2. Market background and user pain points
3. Product highlights (3 core selling points)
4. Feature demo or screenshots
5. Competitive advantages
6. Pricing and launch plan
7. Call-to-action page

Style: Visually impactful, clean and bold, suitable for public launch.

edu-english-words.label: English Vocabulary
edu-english-words.prompt:
I am preparing for the CET-4 exam. Please help me organize a high-frequency core vocabulary learning list with the following requirements:

1. Select 20 high-frequency must-know words
2. Provide phonetic symbols, Chinese definitions, and a short example sentence for each word
3. Group by theme (such as campus life, work, technology, etc.)
4. Provide a quiz at the end to help me test my memory

edu-math-explain.label: Math Problem Explanation
edu-math-explain.description: Detailed solution process for math problems
edu-math-explain.prompt:
Please explain the following mathematical knowledge in an easy-to-understand way:

Problem: Solve the quadratic equation 2x² + 3x - 5 = 0

Requirements:
1. First review the general form of quadratic equations and the quadratic formula
2. Show the complete substitution and calculation process step by step
3. Analyze the nature of roots using the discriminant
4. Finally verify if the answer is correct
5. Provide a similar practice problem for me to consolidate

edu-essay-writing.label: Essay Writing Guidance
edu-essay-writing.prompt:
Please provide essay writing guidance on the topic "My Most Unforgettable Trip":

1. First provide a clear writing outline (structural suggestions for introduction, body, and conclusion)
2. Share 3 techniques to make the article more vivid (such as detailed description, sensory description, scene-based emotion)
3. Write a sample opening paragraph to show how to attract readers
4. List 5 good words and sentences that can be used in this essay
5. Remind common writing problems and pitfalls to avoid

edu-knowledge-explain.label: Knowledge Explanation
edu-knowledge-explain.description: Explain complex knowledge in simple language
edu-knowledge-explain.prompt:
Please explain the concept of "photosynthesis" in easy-to-understand language:

1. Summarize what photosynthesis is in one sentence
2. Explain the principle with everyday life analogies
3. Draw a simple process of photosynthesis (text-based flowchart)
4. Explain the importance of photosynthesis for Earth and humanity
5. Propose 3 thinking questions to help me deepen my understanding
